summary: The implementation addresses both requirements with a user profile display component and tech head circuit brain logo integration. REQ-12 is fully implemented with a UserProfileDisplay component showing name, email, college in the header. REQ-13 is fully implemented with logo.dim_400x400.png replacing text-based logo in both Layout header and SplashScreen component. All acceptance criteria appear to be met based on the diff evidence.

hallucinated_features.description: Premium badge display in user profile showing 'Premium' status with gradient styling
hallucinated_features.reason: The UserProfileDisplay component includes conditional rendering of a premium badge (userProfile.isPremium) with gradient styling. This feature was not requested in REQ-12 or REQ-13, which only specified displaying name, email, and college.

hallucinated_features.description: Avatar with initials for user profile
hallucinated_features.reason: The implementation includes an Avatar component with user initials derived from the name field. The requirement specified displaying profile information (name, email, college) but did not request avatar/initials visualization.

hallucinated_features.description: Glow effect and pulse animation behind logo in splash screen
hallucinated_features.reason: The SplashScreen component includes animated glow effects with blur and pulse animations behind the logo. REQ-13 only specified replacing the logo and maintaining proper dimensions/visibility, not adding decorative animation effects.
